role: This file is the operator's main inbox/triage surface region component, rendering escalated decisions, build intents, deferred offers, held builds, and resolved items as a multi-lane triage deck.
capabilities: Render inbox headline with awaiting count badge and 'walk these' action
Display build-intent escalations in a dedicated decision→build lane via BuildIntentCard
Display deferred_offer items as resumable parked-offer cards
Group remaining escalations by action into visual lanes and separate test-pollution items
Render the deferred queue of held builds from the activity log with deduplication
Render a collapsible resolved-for-you audit lane
Provide click-to-thing navigation for items carrying a ui_target
Start an operator walk over all live escalations
Use shared kit components and per-build error boundaries
substance_why: It implements a complete triage UI with multiple lanes, filtering/grouping logic, interaction wiring, error boundaries, and integration with the shared kit and context.
interactions_present: Click 'walk these' button calls startWalk over live escalation ids
BuildIntentCard click opens COA, demonstrates node type, and navigates via resolveUiTarget
Click on a deferred offer Surface calls reviveOffer
Click on an action-lane Surface calls openCoa
Click 'go to thing' button calls resolveUiTarget with stopPropagation
Click on a deferred-queue Surface calls openCoa if surfaced
Click resolved lane header toggles showResolved; click resolved Surface calls openCoa
interactions_missing: Deferred-offers lane has no registered data-ui-ref (ui://inbox/deferred-offers pending registration)
No loading or skeleton state while inbox data is fetched
No error handling or retry for startWalk, reviveOffer, or resolveUiTarget failures
No keyboard navigation or shortcut interactions
No empty-state messaging for deferred queue or resolved lane
performance_risks: Deferred queue filters and dedupes the full events array on every render without memoization
Multiple filter passes over live_escalations and regex tests run on every render
Long escalation/deferred/resolved lists are rendered without virtualization
Inline callbacks created inside map loops may cause unnecessary child re-renders
reuse_why: The triage concepts, preserved ui:// addresses, and BuildIntentCard composition should be retained, but the monolithic component and unmemoized data derivations need to be refactored.
decomposition_hints: Extract lane data derivation (builds, deferred offers, action grouping, deferred queue) into a memoized hook or selector
Split each lane into its own subcomponent: BuildReviewLane, DeferredOffersLane, ActionLanes, DeferredQueueLane, ResolvedAuditLane
Move interaction handlers (startWalk, reviveOffer, resolveUiTarget wrappers) into a controller hook so the region component stays presentational
Encapsulate resolved audit toggle and rendering in a separate component
